summary: Documented hot-only default CodeWiki operating context, explicit archive access, and CodeWiki user-facing UI naming; created TASK-071 for implementation.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/graph.md states default graph/status/state consumers receive hot working-set context only and archive refs/restore indexes require explicit archive/restore/audit requests.
.codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md states default CodeWiki operating context hides cold roadmap/archive history.
.codewiki/kb/system/control-room-ui.md uses CodeWiki UI as user-facing name and documents hot-only default UI behavior.
.codewiki/kb/product/uis/control-room.md uses CodeWiki UI as user-facing name and documents hidden cold archive data by default.
roadmap_changes: TASK-071 created for hot-only default operating context, explicit archive view, and CodeWiki UI naming.
